_note: PRGC Part B — second prospective committed Phase-1. Committed at PR-open, before Copilot/CI. Subject = the Cycle-003 guardrails PR (no-op guard + auto-review workflow + restored CLAUDE.md + Cycle 002/003 ledger).
self_rationale: Truth is held LOW (74) on purpose, and honestly: the no-op-pr-guard logic I verified locally (0-change fails, real change passes) — high confidence there — BUT the auto-request-copilot-review workflow is UNVERIFIED: I do not know that the `copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot]` API request actually works, and I said so in the file itself + built a reminder fallback. Claiming these guardrails 'work' would repeat the exact over-claim the retro caught (#42 'tests 5/5' for absent files; #46 'verified clean'). So truth reflects: one part verified, one part explicitly unproven. Humility high (88) because I flagged the unverified part, and because this PR also surfaced my OWN prior over-claim — I reported #52's CLAUDE.md 'adopted' when the merge silently dropped it (now L7). Handoff high (86): small, reviewable, honestly-annotated. This Phase-1 predicts: if the auto-review workflow fails in practice, that is EXPECTED, not a miss (I flagged it); a real miss would be the no-op guard not firing, or a broken YAML.
requires: external_anchor (this PR's Copilot review + CI + the no-op guard running on itself)
